class.name: AbilitySystemCue
class.brief_description: Resource for event activation and synchronization within the Ability System.
class.description:
[AbilitySystemCue] is the base class for resources that handle high-level event activation and synchronization, such as playing animations or sounds in response to effects and ability triggers.
For most use cases, use the specialized cue classes: - [AbilitySystemCueAnimation] - For synchronizing animations. - [AbilitySystemCueAudio] - For synchronizing audio effects.
You can extend this base class in GDScript for completely custom cue behavior: [codeblock] extends AbilitySystemCue
func _on_execute(spec: AbilitySystemCueSpec): # Custom logic here print("Custom cue triggered!") [/codeblock]

method.name: _on_active
method.description: Virtual method called when the cue becomes active.

method.name: _on_execute
method.description: Virtual method called when the cue is executed instantly.

method.name: _on_remove
method.description: Virtual method called when the cue is removed.

method.name: get_activation_blocked_tags
method.description: Returns the list of tags that block this cue from triggering.

method.name: get_activation_required_tags
method.description: Returns the list of tags required for this cue to trigger.

method.name: set_activation_blocked_tags
method.description: Sets the list of tags that block this cue.

method.name: set_activation_required_tags
method.description: Sets the list of tags required for this cue to activate.

members.member: Unique name for this cue resource.
Defines when the cue is triggered (OnExecute, OnActive, or OnRemove).

Optional name of a node registered in the [AbilitySystemComponent] via [method AbilitySystemComponent.register_node]. If set, the cue will target that specific node; otherwise, it will use the component's default nodes.

constants.constant: Triggered for instant effects (e.g., hit impact, explosion).
Triggered when an effect/ability becomes active.
